subject: english
topic_title: Essay Writing: Story Writing - 'It Is a Man's World'
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Explain the demands of story writing
Use simple past and related past forms appropriately
Develop a narrative around the given topic

sections.heading: Guidance
sections.content: Story writing requires imagination and orderly presentation of events leading to the climax.

sections.heading: Topic Focus
sections.content: The note explains that the story should revolve around men taking over in different areas of life or a particular man who excelled, and that simple past tense should be used frequently in the narration.
